keyPoints: Separate active context from retained knowledge
whatILearned: Useful knowledge needs explicit retention rules instead of unlimited context.
whyItMatters: Workspace-aware founder memory should retain only evidence that supports future decisions.

whatILearned: A strong founder story explains one meaningful change instead of listing every task.
whyItMatters: The daily reel needs a central thesis rather than a chronological activity dump.

nextActions.text: Require one thesis per story plan

keyPoints: Compile public media from an allow-listed manifest
whatILearned: Privacy should be enforced before public story planning, not only before rendering.
whyItMatters: The public planner should never receive confidential workspace evidence.
